note: Accepted PRODUCTION (non-test/fixture) sharded≡exact RESOLVED-edge divergences on this repo, plus the downstream SCC-membership divergence count. functionsOnly{Exact,Sharded} MUST be 0 (a hard failure). A run EXCEEDING either number fails graph-equivalence-check (a resolver regression — e.g. reintroduced dist/*.d.ts under-resolution drops real cross-package edges). This is a ratchet: a decrease passes and prints a hint to tighten the number.
